failed().notice: Returns true if any test assertion has failed.

testCamelotCurveArb().notice: Fork test: execute the live USDC.e→[Camelot]→USDT→[Curve]→USDC.e cycle.         Uses deal() to prefund repayment so the flash loan succeeds even if         the on-chain state has shifted since detection.

testWithdraw().notice: Withdraw moves tokens sitting in the contract to owner.
